overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy sprinting through a vibrant post-apocalyptic wilderness. The environment features distinctive red blight vegetation infecting rocky terrain, scattered coniferous trees, and massive cliff faces under bright midday sun with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky plateau with red blight infection

agents.ego_description: sprinting across open rocky terrain toward distant landmarks, bow visible on back

entered.detail: uneven reddish rocky ground with patches of grass
tall thin evergreen trees dotting the horizon
tall giraffe-like mechanical structure visible in the distance against the sky
vibrant red coral-like infected plants growing on the ground
light-colored layered rock formation rising on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide rocky plateau under bright sunlight. Aloy runs forward across uneven terrain dotted with red blight vegetation. In the distance, a Tallneck machine stands silhouetted against the sky while scattered trees line the left horizon. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the character moves toward the cliff face on the right.

agents.ego_description: running along the base of a cliff wall, passing a large twisted tree on the right

entered.detail: massive twisted tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches leaning against the cliff
vertical rock wall covered in green moss and vines
large green fern plants growing in clusters along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as Aloy runs alongside a massive moss-covered cliff face. A prominent ancient tree with a twisted trunk dominates the right side, its branches casting shadows on the trail. Fern clusters appear on the left while red blight patches spread across the ground. The Tallneck and distant trees fade from view as the camera follows the character deeper into the cliffside route.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense overgrown trail with red blight

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense ferns and red vegetation, moving toward more open ground ahead

entered.detail: thick clusters of large prehistoric-style ferns lining the path
thick dark tree trunk with rough bark texture
jagged rock formation emerging from the vegetation on the left
large rounded rocks covered in green moss

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes increasingly overgrown as Aloy moves through dense fern undergrowth that reaches waist height. The cliff and ancient tree pass out of view behind, replaced by mossy boulders and twisted tree trunks. Red blight vegetation continues to spread across the right side of the path while the terrain opens slightly ahead. The camera maintains steady follow-cam positioning as the character pushes through the lush vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a rocky plateau that gradually narrows into a dense, overgrown cliffside trail. It begins with Aloy sprinting across an open expanse of uneven terrain dotted with red blight vegetation, with a distant Tallneck silhouetted against the bright midday sky. As the character moves forward, the open vista fades and the path tightens alongside a massive moss-covered cliff face and a prominent twisted ancient tree. The scene then shifts as the cliff and tree recede, replaced by waist-high fern undergrowth and mossy boulders that crowd the trail. Finally, the camera maintains its steady follow-position as the character pushes through the lush vegetation, with red blight continuing to spread across the right side of the opening terrain.
